segments: : قلت لأبي الحسن عليه السلام: إن علي بن يقطين أرسلني إليك برسالة أسألك الدعاء له فقال: في أمر الآخرة؟ قلت: نعم قال: فوضع يده على صدره، ثم قال: ضمنت لعلي بن يقطين ألا تمسه النار أبدا
arabic.text: : قلت لأبي الحسن عليه السلام: إن علي بن يقطين أرسلني إليك برسالة أسألك الدعاء له فقال: في أمر الآخرة؟ قلت: نعم قال: فوضع يده على صدره، ثم قال: ضمنت لعلي بن يقطين ألا تمسه النار أبدا

segments: 1. [1/208] Rijal al-Kashshi: Muhammad b. Masud from Muhammad b. Nusayr from Muhammad b. Isa from Muhammad b. Abi Umayr from Abd al-Rahman b. al-Hajjaj who said: I said to Abi al-Hasan عليه السلام: Ali b. Yaqtin has sent me to you with a message – he asks that you supplicate for him, he [the Imam] said: concerning the hereafter? I said: yes, so he [the Imam] put his hand on his chest and then said: I guarantee for Ali b. Yaqtin that the fire will never touch him – ever.
en.ammaar-muslim.text: 1. [1/208] Rijal al-Kashshi: Muhammad b. Masud from Muhammad b. Nusayr from Muhammad b. Isa from Muhammad b. Abi Umayr from Abd al-Rahman b. al-Hajjaj who said: I said to Abi al-Hasan عليه السلام: Ali b. Yaqtin has sent me to you with a message – he asks that you supplicate for him, he [the Imam] said: concerning the hereafter? I said: yes, so he [the Imam] put his hand on his chest and then said: I guarantee for Ali b. Yaqtin that the fire will never touch him – ever.

narratorChain.raw: [1/208] رجال الكشي: محمد بن مسعود، عن محمد بن نصير، عن محمد بن عيسى، عن محمد بن أبي عمير، عن عبد الرحمن بن الحجاج قال

segments: : خرجت عاما من الأعوام و معي مال كثير لأبي إبراهيم عليه السلام، و أودعني علي بن يقطين رسالة سأله الدعاء، فلما فرغت من حوائجي و أوصلت المال إليه قلت: جعلت فداك سألني علي بن يقطين أن تدعو الله له فقال: للآخرة؟ قلت: نعم، قال: فوضع يده على صدره ثم قال: ضمنت لعلي بن يقطين ألا تمسه النار
arabic.text: : خرجت عاما من الأعوام و معي مال كثير لأبي إبراهيم عليه السلام، و أودعني علي بن يقطين رسالة سأله الدعاء، فلما فرغت من حوائجي و أوصلت المال إليه قلت: جعلت فداك سألني علي بن يقطين أن تدعو الله له فقال: للآخرة؟ قلت: نعم، قال: فوضع يده على صدره ثم قال: ضمنت لعلي بن يقطين ألا تمسه النار

segments: 2. [2/209] Rijal al-Kashshi: Muhammad b. Masud from Muhammad b. Isa from al-Hasan b. Mahbub from Abd al-Rahman b. al-Hajjaj who said: I came out one year with a lot of wealth belonging to Abu Ibrahim عليه السلام [in my possession]. Ali b. Yaqtin had also entrusted me with a message asking his [the Imam’s] supplication, so when I finished attending to my duties and handed over the wealth to him – I said: may I be made your ransom, Ali b. Yaqtin requested me to ask you to supplicate for him, he عليه السلام asked: for the hereafter? I said: yes, so he [the Imam] put his hand on his chest and then said: I guarantee for Ali b. Yaqtin that the fire will never touch him.
en.ammaar-muslim.text: 2. [2/209] Rijal al-Kashshi: Muhammad b. Masud from Muhammad b. Isa from al-Hasan b. Mahbub from Abd al-Rahman b. al-Hajjaj who said: I came out one year with a lot of wealth belonging to Abu Ibrahim عليه السلام [in my possession]. Ali b. Yaqtin had also entrusted me with a message asking his [the Imam’s] supplication, so when I finished attending to my duties and handed over the wealth to him – I said: may I be made your ransom, Ali b. Yaqtin requested me to ask you to supplicate for him, he عليه السلام asked: for the hereafter? I said: yes, so he [the Imam] put his hand on his chest and then said: I guarantee for Ali b. Yaqtin that the fire will never touch him.

narratorChain.raw: [2/209] رجال الكشي: محمد بن مسعود، عن محمد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن عبد الرحمن بن الحجاج قال

segments: : سمعت أبا الحسن الخراساني عليه السلام يقول: أما إن علي بن يقطين مضى و صاحبه عنه راض يعني أبا الحسن عليه السلام
arabic.text: : سمعت أبا الحسن الخراساني عليه السلام يقول: أما إن علي بن يقطين مضى و صاحبه عنه راض يعني أبا الحسن عليه السلام

segments: 3. [3/210] Rijal al-Kashshi: Muhammad b. Masud from Muhammad b. Nusayr and Jibril b. Ahmad from Muhammad b. Isa from Yaqub b. Yaqtin who said: I heard Abu al-Hasan al-Khurasani [al-Ridha] عليه السلام say: as for Ali b. Yaqtin then he left [this world] while his master was pleased with him – meaning by that Abu al-Hasan (i.e. al-Kadhim) عليه السلام
en.ammaar-muslim.text: 3. [3/210] Rijal al-Kashshi: Muhammad b. Masud from Muhammad b. Nusayr and Jibril b. Ahmad from Muhammad b. Isa from Yaqub b. Yaqtin who said: I heard Abu al-Hasan al-Khurasani [al-Ridha] عليه السلام say: as for Ali b. Yaqtin then he left [this world] while his master was pleased with him – meaning by that Abu al-Hasan (i.e. al-Kadhim) عليه السلام

narratorChain.raw: [3/210] رجال الكشي: محمد بن مسعود، عن محمد بن نصير و جبريل بن أحمد، عن محمد بن عيسى، عن يعقوب بن يقطين قال

segments: : قال أبو الحسن عليه السلام: من سعادة علي بن يقطين أني ذكرته في الموقف
arabic.text: : قال أبو الحسن عليه السلام: من سعادة علي بن يقطين أني ذكرته في الموقف

segments: 4. [4/211] Rijal al-Kashshi: Hamduwayh from Muhammad b. Isa from Yunus b. Abd al-Rahman who said: Abu al-Hasan عليه السلام said: of the felicities enjoyed by Ali b. Yaqtin is the fact that I remembered him [supplicated for him] at the Mawqif [the plains of Arafa in the Hajj].
en.ammaar-muslim.text: 4. [4/211] Rijal al-Kashshi: Hamduwayh from Muhammad b. Isa from Yunus b. Abd al-Rahman who said: Abu al-Hasan عليه السلام said: of the felicities enjoyed by Ali b. Yaqtin is the fact that I remembered him [supplicated for him] at the Mawqif [the plains of Arafa in the Hajj].

narratorChain.raw: [4/211] رجال الكشي: حمدويه، عن محمد بن عيسى، عن يونس بن عبد الرحمن قال

segments: 5. [5/212] Rijal al-Kashshi: Hamduwayh and Ibrahim from Abu Ja`far from al-Hasan b. Ali that: his father Ali b. Yaqtin – may Allah have mercy on him – sent to his female slaves [to hand over to him whatever they possessed of wealth] such that he even carried away their gifts [given to them] by the one who sold them to him [their former master], then he sent to him [al-Kadhim] what he [the Imam] had enjoined on him of [collecting] their [al-Kadhim’s sons’ prospective wives’] dowries, and he added three thousand gold coins for the Walima [public lunch], so it all came to thirteen thousand gold coins in a single installment.
en.ammaar-muslim.text: 5. [5/212] Rijal al-Kashshi: Hamduwayh and Ibrahim from Abu Ja`far from al-Hasan b. Ali that: his father Ali b. Yaqtin – may Allah have mercy on him – sent to his female slaves [to hand over to him whatever they possessed of wealth] such that he even carried away their gifts [given to them] by the one who sold them to him [their former master], then he sent to him [al-Kadhim] what he [the Imam] had enjoined on him of [collecting] their [al-Kadhim’s sons’ prospective wives’] dowries, and he added three thousand gold coins for the Walima [public lunch], so it all came to thirteen thousand gold coins in a single installment.

narratorChain.raw: [5/212] رجال الكشي: حمدويه وابراهيم، عن أبو جعفر، عن الحسن بن علي: أن أباه علي بن يقطين رحمه الله وجه الى جواريه حتى حمل حباءهن ممن باعه، فوجه اليه بما فرض عليه من مهورهن وزاد ثلاثة آلاف دينار للوليمة، فبلغ ذلك ثلاثة عشر ألف دينار في

parts.text: الحسن بن علي: أن أباه علي بن يقطين رحمه الله وجه
باعه، فوجه اليه بما فرض عليه من مهورهن وزاد ثلاثة آلاف دينار للوليمة، فبلغ ذلك ثلاثة عشر ألف دينار في

segments: : قلت له: إني قد أشفقت من دعوة أبي عبد الله عليه السلام على يقطين وما ولد، فقال: يا أبا الحسن ليس حيث تذهب، إنما المؤمن في صلب الكافر بمنزلة الحصاة في اللبنة يجي المطر فيغسل اللبنة ولا يضر الحصاة شيئا
arabic.text: : قلت له: إني قد أشفقت من دعوة أبي عبد الله عليه السلام على يقطين وما ولد، فقال: يا أبا الحسن ليس حيث تذهب، إنما المؤمن في صلب الكافر بمنزلة الحصاة في اللبنة يجي المطر فيغسل اللبنة ولا يضر الحصاة شيئا

segments: 6. [6/213] al-Kafi: Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Ibn Abi Umayr from Ali b. Yaqtin from Abi al-Hasan Musa عليه السلام. He [Ali b. Yaqtin] said: I said to him: I am fearful because of the supplication of Abi Abdillah عليه السلام against Yaqtin and his off-spring, so he [the Imam] said: O Aba al-Hasan [Ali b. Yaqtin] it is not as you think, verily the believer who arises from the back-bone [lineage] of a disbeliever is like the stone in a clay brick, when rain comes it washes away the clay [dissolves it to mud] but does not harm the stone in any way.
en.ammaar-muslim.text: 6. [6/213] al-Kafi: Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Ibn Abi Umayr from Ali b. Yaqtin from Abi al-Hasan Musa عليه السلام. He [Ali b. Yaqtin] said: I said to him: I am fearful because of the supplication of Abi Abdillah عليه السلام against Yaqtin and his off-spring, so he [the Imam] said: O Aba al-Hasan [Ali b. Yaqtin] it is not as you think, verily the believer who arises from the back-bone [lineage] of a disbeliever is like the stone in a clay brick, when rain comes it washes away the clay [dissolves it to mud] but does not harm the stone in any way.

narratorChain.raw: [6/213] الكافي: علي بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن علي بن يقطين، عن أبي الحسن موسى عليه السلام قال

parts.text: أبي الحسن موسى عليه السلام قال
